opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My scalp is burning like it's on fire, and my hair is falling out in absolute clumps. I'm terrified I'm going completely bald by tomorrow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It all came on suddenly over the last day — the burning and the hair coming out so fast really scared me and I couldn't wait until my usual clinic was open.

symptom_narrative.duration: roughly a day and it seems to be spreading
symptom_narrative.character: round bald patches that are getting bigger, with a horrible burning, painful feeling across the whole scalp
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the burning feels really intense and the amount of hair coming out is frightening — it feels like the worst thing that's ever happened to me
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on my scalp — a few round patches that seem to be growing at the edges
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant burning; the shedding is worst when I touch or brush my hair
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — resting doesn't help the burning
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: touching, brushing or checking my hair makes more come out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel panicky and short of breath, my heart is pounding, and I couldn't sleep at all last night
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't focus on anything, I've just been sitting here crying and panicking

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: an autoimmune thyroid problem that I take a tablet for

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; feeling very isolated and overwhelmed tonight with no one currently around for support

objective_data_offered.value: several well-defined round patches of hair loss on the scalp; the skin underneath looks smooth and normal, with no obvious redness, flaking or sores
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shared photo/video over chat; lighting and angle limit what can be seen and no close-up scalp examination is possible

objective_data_offered.value: clumps of hair come away when I gently touch or brush the edges of the patches
my heart feels like it's pounding and I'm breathing fast because I'm so panicked
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported sensation during acute distress; no measured heart rate or respiratory rate available
